eligibility_criteria: No work, study, or residence intent
Register with FRRO if stay >180 days
Job offer from registered Indian company
Position not fillable by Indian national
Eligible to become Indian citizen on 26 Jan 1950
Belongs to territory joined India after 15 Aug 1947
Spouse of eligible foreign-origin person (married ≥2 yrs)
Pakistani/Bangladeshi nationals not eligible for OCI
Spouse, dependent child (<18) or parent of valid visa/OCI holder
Principal visa holder valid in India
documents: Proof of principal visa holder status

eligibility_criteria: K-1: US citizen petitioner; met in last 2 years; free to marry; intent to marry in 90 days
IR-1/CR-1: Legal marriage to US citizen/LPR
Petitioner meets income requirement (125% Federal Poverty Level)
No criminal record or serious health issues
documents: Proof of ties to home country

eligibility_criteria: Acceptance from a Designated Learning Institution (DLI)
Intent to leave Canada after studies
Intra-company transfers: ≥1 year in same role
CUSMA or IEC eligible if applicable
≥1 year skilled work experience in past 10 yrs (NOC TEER 0-3)
Sufficient settlement funds (unless working in Canada)
PGP: sponsor meets income for 3 years; lottery intake
Intend to leave UK at end of visit
Not living in UK through frequent visits
No work or study >30 days (exceptions apply)
No serious criminal convictions or prior UK violations
Unconditional offer from licensed UK sponsor
Valid Confirmation of Acceptance for Studies (CAS)
Sufficient funds (GBP 1,334/month London; GBP 1,023/month elsewhere) + tuition

Work.max_stay: Up to 5 years; ILR after 5 yrs
eligibility_criteria: Job offer from UK licensed employer
Role at RQF Level 6+ (graduate) or listed sub-degree roles
Valid immigration status during qualifying period
Passed Life in the UK Test
documents: Life in the UK Test certificate

eligibility_criteria: Sponsor: British citizen, settled person, or limited leave holder
Genuine relationship: married or cohabiting ≥2 yrs
Applicant not under general grounds for refusal
Cannot apply for Student Visa from inside Australia
Cannot apply from inside Australia if on Visitor Visa

Work.max_stay: Up to 2-4 years depending on stream

eligibility_criteria: Submit Expression of Interest (EOI) via SkillSelect
Sufficient points based on age, skills, experience, and qualifications
Sponsor: Australian citizen, PR, or eligible NZ citizen
Sponsor not restricted by prior sponsorships or domestic violence orders
Valid passport (issued ≤10 yrs, valid ≥3 months beyond departure)
No prior Schengen visa refusals or overstays

Student.max_stay: Program duration (up to 3 yrs per permit)
eligibility_criteria: Letter of admission from recognised German university
German B2/C1 or English proficiency for English-taught programs
IT professionals: ≥3 yrs experience if no degree
Federal Employment Agency approval if required
≥5 yrs legal residence (EU Blue Card: 21-33 months)

Family.max_stay: Co-terminus with sponsor initially; can become independent
eligibility_criteria: Sponsor: valid German residence or citizenship
Spouse/partner German A1 language proficiency (if required)
No grounds for refusal under German law
Valid passport (issued ≤10 yrs, valid ≥3 months beyond departure)

Student.max_stay: Program duration (validated within 3 months of arrival)
eligibility_criteria: French or English proficiency as needed
Valid job offer from French employer
Work authorization obtained by employer from DREETS
Highly skilled: Talent Passport may apply
≥5 years continuous legal residence in France
Tax compliance, no serious criminal record

Family.max_stay: 1 year initial; renewable toward Carte de Sejour
eligibility_criteria: Sponsor legally resident in France ≥18 months
Sponsor has stable income above SMIC
Family may need civic integration training pre-visa
Sufficient funds (NZD 1,000/month or NZD 400 if accommodation paid)
Genuine intention to visit and leave NZ
Visa waiver for some nationalities (UK, USA, Australia, etc.)
Sufficient funds for tuition and living costs
Proof of tuition payment or arrangements
Genuine intent to leave NZ after studies
Job offer from accredited NZ employer
Role not restricted by immigration rules
EOI submitted under Skilled Migrant Category
Sufficient points (age, skills, work, qualifications, family)
Skilled employment in NZ at time of invitation

Family.max_stay: 2 years temporary; permanent on second stage
eligibility_criteria: Genuine partnership with NZ citizen / PR
Sponsor ≥18 yrs, citizen or PR, financially supportive
Exclusive partnership (married, civil union, or de facto)
documents: Proof of cohabitation or intent to live together

eligibility_criteria: Genuine purpose: tourism, visiting family/friends, events, or short business
Sufficient funds for stay and return
Visa-free access for 68+ countries (USA, UK, AU, CA, EU)

Student.max_stay: Duration of course (1-2 yrs per COE; renewable)
eligibility_criteria: Letter of admission from recognized Japanese school/university
Certificate of Eligibility (COE) issued by institution
Sufficient funds for tuition and living expenses
Occupation fits Japanese work visa categories
Highly Skilled Professional visa for high earners (≥70 points)
10 yrs continuous residence (5 yrs on work/activity visa; HSP reduces to 5 yrs or 1 yr for 80+ points)
Guarantor support from Japanese national or PR holder
Spouse or unmarried child of Japanese national, or dependent of foreign national with work/study visa
Visa-free for many nationalities; some need pre-approved visa
Course ≥9 months or approved by MOE/ICA
Sufficient funds for tuition and living

Work.visa_code: Employment Pass / S Pass / Work Permit
Work.max_stay: EP: 2–3 yrs; S Pass: up to 2 yrs

eligibility_criteria: Hold EP/S Pass ≥6 months or qualifying LTVP
Economic contribution or investment in Singapore
Principal holder: EP or S Pass ≥SGD 6,000/month
documents: Sponsor's work pass or PR proof

eligibility_criteria: Genuine tourist purpose; no work/residence intent
Visa-free entry for many Western nationals
Proof of tuition and living costs
Valid job offer from UAE-licensed employer
Work permit/entry permit issued by MoHRE or Free Zone Authority
Investor, business owner, or high-value project eligibility
Valid UAE employment contract or minimum salary AED 30,000
Priority sector employment (medicine, IT, engineering, etc.)
documents: Proof of investment / business / job eligibility

Family.max_stay: Co-terminus with principal visa; 1–2 years renewable
eligibility_criteria: Sponsor holds valid UAE residence visa
Eligible dependants: spouse, children, parents (if dependent)
documents: Sponsor's UAE residence visa & Emirates ID

Tourist.max_stay: Up to 90 days in any 180-day period
eligibility_criteria: EU/EEA citizens do not require a visa
Dutch or English proficiency as required
MVV required for most non-EU/EEA nationals

Work.visa_code: GVVA / Highly Skilled Migrant / EU Blue Card

eligibility_criteria: ≥5 years continuous legal residence in Netherlands
No illegal stay or gaps in permits
Passed civic integration exam or exempt

Family.max_stay: 1 year initial; extendable; permanent after 5 years
eligibility_criteria: Sponsor: Dutch/EU citizen or non-EU with long-term/permanent residence
Sponsor earns ≥100% social assistance norm (~€1,800 net single person)
Genuine long-term relationship (married, registered, or exclusive partnership)
Civic integration exam may be required for partner
TB test may be required for certain nationalities
documents: Sponsor’s residence permit or nationality proof

eligibility_criteria: Genuine visit purpose (tourism, family/friends, short business, events)
Visa-exempt for many countries including USA, UK, EU, Canada, Australia, Japan
Acceptance from Irish institution (ILEP-approved or state-funded)
Tuition fee payment or scholarship proof
Level 8 degree (NFQ) or ≥2 years relevant experience
Position advertised to EEA nationals ≥2 weeks

Permanent_Residence.max_stay: Indefinite (5-year Stamp 4; eligible for citizenship after qualifying period)
eligibility_criteria: ≥5 years continuous legal residence on eligible permission
Stable and sufficient income (no reliance on social welfare)

Family.max_stay: Duration of sponsor's permission; subject to review
eligibility_criteria: Sponsor: Irish/EU citizen or non-EEA with Stamp 4/long-term residency
Genuine and subsisting relationship (married, civil, or de facto ≥2 years cohabitation)
Sponsor has sufficient funds (no public fund reliance)
Both parties ≥18 years old for spouse/partner
No criminal convictions or public policy concerns
Private health insurance for family member
